---
name: Feature Request
about: Request a new user-facing UWE feature
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: feature
assignees: ""
---

# Feature Request

## Feature Name


## Engineering Problem

What real-world engineering, fabrication, design review, testing, or reference problem does this solve?


## User Goal

What should the user be able to do when this feature is complete?


## Where It Belongs

Example:

- Convert It
- Fabricate It
- Reference It
- Reference It > Physics
- Window Testing Tools
- Material Data


## Inputs

List all user inputs, units, dropdowns, toggles, or defaults.


## Outputs

List all calculated results, notes, warnings, or displayed values.


## Default Values

List any default values the tool should start with.


## Data Needed

List any material data, formulas, constants, standards, or reference values needed.


## UI Requirements

- Follow UWE black/green terminal-style UI.
- Keep layout simple and engineering-focused.
- Use clear labels and units.
- Avoid unnecessary visual clutter.


## Search Requirements

Should this feature appear in search?

If yes, include:

- Title:
- Category:
- Description:
- Tags:
- Aliases:
- Route:


## Acceptance Criteria

How will we know this feature is complete?

- [ ] Feature/page exists in the correct location.
- [ ] Inputs work correctly.
- [ ] Outputs calculate correctly.
- [ ] Navigation is updated.
- [ ] Search entry is added if needed.
- [ ] Existing features still work.
- [ ] Code follows AGENT_CONTEXT.md and ARCHITECTURE.md.


## Testing Steps

List the manual tests needed to verify the feature.


## Notes / Future Ideas

Anything that should not be built now but may matter later.
